message:
feat(test): expand proptest coverage for search, segment_tree, union_find, fenwick_tree

Add arb strategies for SearchQuery, SearchFilter, Pagination,
PaginationCursor, SnippetConfig, SearchSortOrder, SortField with serde
tests. Add behavioral invariant tests for segment tree, union-find, and
fenwick tree data structures. Each file expanded from 30 to 37 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
